decisions.text: Fairlight checkpoint 1 is scoped to CA + WA and stops at the cohort, benchmark, resilience-gap, and confidence-tagging layer.
Checkpoint 1 uses a fixed contract: submitted_on must be null, rows are deduped on ein + fiscal_year, and NTEE is a cohort booster rather than a gate.

Stage 0 also locks the 7-year benchmark window, the core metric formulas, the confidence tiers, the action-label vocabulary, the urgency flag rule, the recovery-analog sourcing rule, and the output schemas.
All future state changes after this bootstrap go through orchestrator commands from main.

recent_changes.author: Saurav
recent_changes.summary: Data phase complete. v2 panel built and validated (3.8M rows, 39 cols). Strategy locked. Moving to NTEE enrichment + build phase.

recent_changes.author: Amal
recent_changes.summary: Bootstrap task-01 replaced placeholder state with the fixed checkpoint-1 Fairlight compete task and comparison contract.
